creator: sahil@FreeBSD.org
text:
Attached is another iteration of the shar.  This port still needs some
work and before it can be committed, we need the submitter (or another
interested party) to get involved.  Until then, given the feedback
timeout period as lapsed, I am sending this back to the pool.

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@FreeBSD.org>
